programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: God is waiting on you. Come Home. Luke 15 (Anchorage, AK, 1984).

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Trusting God gets easier when we get to know His character. Learn how to confidently lean on Him during every season of life.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: Autumn in the Vineyard
programme.desc: When Frankie Baldwin and Nate Deluca both have a claim to ownership of Sorrento Farm, they are forced to divide the vineyard right down the middle and work the fields alongside each other.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: God Speaking in the Wilderness Pt2
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable and life-changing, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible with the aim of the word of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Great Deceiver Who Seeks to Destroy
programme.desc: The Antichrist in his arrogance and pride will seek to destroy all that God has created. Learn more about his activities and ultimate destruction.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: A group of California Christians present the claims of Christ to unbelievers at Huntington Beach.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Bible Brigade Versus the Ambassador of Ignorance
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.sub-title: Turn it Up 2 - Praise turns our pain into peace
programme.desc: This week Magz & Shaz are back, we have another look at our memory verse, Lucca and the gang play an amazing game, Amy is bringing the word and so much more!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: You can't have View & Chew without a good food truck. Then the views get big and historic when Allie and Regina check the South Street Seaport Museum.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Post Natal Depression affects 1 in 5 mothers in Australia. The Be That team discuss the journey through PND and how to best support those who are navigating their way to recovery.

programme.title: Autumn in the Vineyard
programme.desc: When Frankie Baldwin and Nate Deluca both have a claim to ownership of Sorrento Farm, they are forced to divide the vineyard right down the middle and work the fields alongside each other.

programme.title: Never too Late to Celebrate
programme.desc: Career-focused dentist Camila is reluctant to celebrate her 30th birthday but inspired by Javi, a Spanish teacher, the two plan a 'quinceanera' themed party to honour her Hispanic heritage.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give real answers to tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Joan of Arc - The Original Influencer
programme.desc: Influence. Everyone wants it; everyone has it; but only few can wield it on the level that Joan of Arc did. Learn how she went from a nobody from nowhere to becoming the original influencer.

programme.title: Always Good News
programme.sub-title: Franklin Graham: Hope from the Ashes
programme.desc: From the rubble of what many called "Hell on earth," Franklin Graham brings a powerful message of hope. Special music from Michael W. Smith and Charity Gayle sets the stage for this timely TV Special.

programme.title: Smoketown
programme.sub-title: Everyone Will Have A Safe Place
programme.desc: In the wake of a mysterious and shocking murder, three unique people - an Assistant Chief of Police, a reporter, and a teenage girl - are empowered to fight for the city's poorest neighbourhood.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Great Deceiver Who Seeks to Destroy
programme.desc: The Antichrist in his arrogance and pride will seek to destroy all that God has created. Learn more about his activities and ultimate destruction.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When an Amish woman discovers her daughter has been kidnapped, she turns to the only person who can help her estranged best friend, who has left the Amish way of life.

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: When her new roommate goes missing in Italy, an art student teams up with her eccentric aunt to save her friend and bring the kidnapper to justice.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: Let's Get Physical
programme.desc: A fitness instructor leads a double life, running a prostitution ring with a client list. Sadie receives an anonymous tip and soon after her studio is raided by authorities.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets By the Lake
programme.desc: A daughter returns home to prove her sister's innocence of murder but is met by a forbidden love, family secrets and a rivalry fuelled by the disappearance of a childhood best friend.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy is a law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes a difficult decision to keep the baby.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: Murder in Nashville
programme.desc: A woman gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with the son of a wealthy power player in the country music scene.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.desc: RD shows a buyer a $1.4 million McLaren Senna. Melissa works to get a Cullinan for her client. Chadwick wants to close the deal on five Rolls Royces.

programme.title: Flipping RVs
programme.sub-title: A Rare Airstream Turns A Pretty Profit
programme.desc: Justin and Anna hope a rare 1959 Airstream Globester will be a quick flip and land them a deal to restore ten trailers for a boutique vintage RV park.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: The guys bring in a vintage 1979 Jeep that is being sent off to auction. It's going to get a finished interior with carpet and panels.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: Jared and Lou take a 1968 Pro Touring Camaro with a turbocharged LS engine and get it ready to ride in the Hot Rod Power Tour.

programme.title: Hooptie World Championship
programme.desc: It's the sixth and final event: the mega-gauntlet. All teams compete in the final challenge, covering dirt, asphalt, drift, slalom and drag.

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: Ian continues to work on the shop truck Dakota. He works on the drivetrain components, including a complete transmission teardown and rebuild.

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: This '80s Ram Charger is back in the FourWheeler shop for an engine swap. The owner wants a gas-powered Hemi, so Ian swaps the old tired engine for one from a local junkyard.

programme.title: Speed Is The New Black
programme.desc: Noah challenges his team to take a 1969 Chevelle and turn it into a fierce speed demon that will win as many car shows as it will attract speeding tickets.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: The shop is ready to finish the Outlaw Porsche. After body and paint, it's set for assembly. Dave adds the details to make it the ultimate Outlaw.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: The guys bring in a vintage 1979 Jeep that is being sent off to auction. It's going to get a finished interior with carpet and panels.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and Benny's friendship blossoms in strange and unexpected ways, leading them to confront questions of privilege, race, sexuality, and dermatology.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave meets NBA all-time leading scorer Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, but gaining his affection is not exactly a lay-up.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and Elz's friendship is tested when they perform together at a bar mitzvah; GaTa has a night out.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave joins an exclusive online dating app and matches with a pop star. Technological courtship ensues, as Dave gets caught up in the excitement of a modern-day romance.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and Emma reminisce about their advertising days while battling present-day identity crises, at one of hip-hop's largest showcases.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave has a professional set back and is forced to spend more time with his parents. Family time has never been more eye-opening.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: While making a video that will vault him to global success, Dave is forced to face reality as the project threatens to implode and create an international incident.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Back home, Dave is trying to hold his own feet to the creative fire, but the world has conspired to throw every possible distraction at him.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave journeys to a legendary recording studio, hoping to break through his creative block, but he is forced to confront his greatest obstacle: his own ego.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave releases his debut album Penith. The rest is history.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and the gang are on tour, first stop: Texas. Dave is looking for love, but Texas is looking for Lil Dicky.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Back in his home town of Philadelphia, Dave grapples with his romantic origin story, both in his art and in real life.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: The tour continues in Atlanta, where an encounter with Rick Ross causes a chain reaction that requires Dave and GaTa's full attention.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Ally joins the tour to rekindle an old flame, while Dave looks to ignite a new one.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave gets a lesson in Southern hospitality, courtesy of his number one fan.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave makes a big decision about the tour, but it blows up in his face.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave's got a new lease on life, a new house and a new house guest. But his friends have other plans.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave attends his first Met Gala, while Gata attends his first mental health panel.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave straddles the line between reality and fantasy as Emma's tour documentary is finally complete.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave's quest for love reaches its epic conclusion.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: In this horror comedy, three vampires who have been roommates for hundreds and hundreds of years try to cope with the complexities of modern life.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires get embroiled in local Staten Island politics as their first step to world domination.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The fragile truce between the vampires and Staten Island's werewolves is tested, and Colin Robinson finds romance with a new co-worker.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires venture into Manhattan to make an alliance with an old friend who is now the king of the Manhattan vampires.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows

programme.desc: The vampires must defend themselves as an international vampire tribunal gathers to judge them for their transgressions.

programme.desc: Enjoy the news from the "Big 4" Fashion Weeks as well as from the other major fashion events to learn about the new collections of A-list and emerging designers, and new arrivals in design and style.

programme.title: Designers
programme.desc: Explore stories of the top fashion designers of all time! Meet the legends, like Coco Chanel or Karl Lagerfeld and don't miss the amazingly talented young designers who shape the future of fashion now.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Legacy
programme.desc: This is the third instalment of the enchanting trilogy about three college friends - Tracy, Avery and Emma - who share a 19th century wedding veil said to bring whoever possesses it true love.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: God is waiting on you. Come Home. Luke 15 (Anchorage, AK, 1984).

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: Event planner Victoria can't wait to attend, and plan, her best friend's Paris wedding. But when she finds out that her ex is bringing a date, she reconnects with her French childhood pen pal. Stars Mallory Jansen, Joshua Sasse.

programme.title: 5000 Blankets
programme.desc: When her husband has a mental breakdown and goes missing, a woman and her young son set out to find him on the streets, sparking a movement of compassion towards those in need and inspiring a city.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible, their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The great disappearing of God's children could happen at any time. Learn about this imminent event, the Rapture.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships. Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Trusting God in Times of Political Upheaval (Part 2)
programme.desc: In part 2 of Trusting God in Times of Political Upheaval, Pastor Bayless examines Daniel's steadfast faith in the midst of political turmoil, even when it put him in danger.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: God's love for us is the most important thing to remember.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: It's God's deep love for us that sustains us through our trials. Today, Joyce shares encouraging insights from her book Unshakeable Trust.

programme.title: The Grief Journey
programme.desc: The Grief Journey centres around a diverse group of individuals who are brought together by their mutual desire to heal. Each member of the class has experienced a profound loss and each individual's story parallels the parables of Jesus.

programme.title: Show Me The Father
programme.desc: An inspiring documentary which demonstrates through dozens of interviews with key influential figures just how vital the role of the father is for families as well as society as a whole.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Being brave and courageous: what does this really means? We might chase success or strive to meet the expectations of others, but it can leave us feeling dissatisfied and unfulfilled.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: In Brisbane, Kristine Vicca is at the forefront of a movement that's changing lives. Through Strong Women Talking, she's empowering First Nations women to heal from trauma.

programme.title: War Room
programme.desc: The Jordan's are a middle-class couple who seemingly have it all. In reality, their marriage is a war zone. Elizabeth discovers she can start fighting for her family instead of against them.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets By the Lake
programme.desc: A daughter returns home to prove her sister's innocence of murder but is met by a forbidden love, family secrets and a rivalry fuelled by the disappearance of a childhood best friend.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: Man with my Husband's Face
programme.desc: When a woman's husband disappears during a kayak trip, everyone assumes that he drowned. When she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, it sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Shane Settel starts to believe in fate after a chance tarot reading. He has the largest success in his professional career and falls in love, but then tragedies begin to follow him.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini goes for a run and doesn't come home. This Northern California missing person case becomes a national story when she returns and her story about being abducted doesn't add up.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer: Melanie McGuire Story
programme.desc: A dramatisation of the romance and marriage of the McGuires, the 2004 murder of Bill, investigation and subsequent trial of Melanie, who dismembered and disposed of her husband's body in suitcases.

programme.desc: Meet this season's modeling stars and those who are on their way to international fashion stardom. Most in-demand girls from around the globe and their fascinating stories!

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Trusting God in Times of Political Upheaval (Part 2)
programme.desc: In part 2 of Trusting God in Times of Political Upheaval, Pastor Bayless examines Daniel's steadfast faith in the midst of political turmoil, even when it put him in danger.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: When bad things happen, we can still trust that God loves us and that He has a good plan for our lives. Be encouraged to trust Him at all times.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: War Room
programme.desc: The Jordan's are a middle-class couple who seemingly have it all. In reality, their marriage is a war zone. Elizabeth discovers she can start fighting for her family instead of against them.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: The heart of the weekly teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares a message from the bible.

programme.title: God's Grace: The Sheila Johnson Story
programme.desc: Based on the life of Sheila Johnson who was diagnosed with stage IV metastatic breast cancer and later found an advocacy group to support Black women and men diagnosed with the disease.

programme.title: Asbury Revival: Desperate for More
programme.desc: On February 8 2023, some students stayed after chapel at Asbury University and continued worshiping. And they kept going for 16 days.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Bible Brigade Versus the Ambassador of Ignorance
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn! One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum! She knows more about shopping than solving crime.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary and Bill team up to investigate a case they believe shouldn't be closed. The women of Hope Valley start a day care. Hickam and Mei celebrate a milestone.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.sub-title: The Calling of Billy Graham pt.2
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God's love keeps us going through our most challenging times. Today, Joyce shares insights from her personal experience with trusting God to encourage you in difficult times.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: War Room
programme.desc: The Jordan's are a middle-class couple who seemingly have it all. In reality, their marriage is a war zone. Elizabeth discovers she can start fighting for her family instead of against them.

programme.title: Prone to Wander
programme.desc: Seven months after a family tragedy, Anastasia Dearborn withdraws to the Appalachian Trail to salvage her identity but gets more than she bargains for after encountering three fellow hikers.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: George Muller lived on radical prayer, depending on God to supply all his needs instead of asking others for help - even in his most desperate situations.

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Birds _ Feathered Wonders of the World
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: You Had Me at Aloha
programme.desc: After seeing cute, producer Paige banter with host applicant Ben during a job interview, the TV network makes them co-hosts for a travelogue for Oahu. Can they work together?

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: An episodic crime drama that follows the investigative work of Detective Gary Travis. Season 2 sees new characters, new crimes, hard-hitting issues, spiritual revelations, surprising new romances and shocking new rivalries.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Following Jesus in John's Gospel Pt4
programme.desc: A six week series exploring the somewhat unique perspective of following Jesus found in John's Gospel.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer: Melanie McGuire Story
programme.desc: A dramatisation of the romance and marriage of the McGuires, the 2004 murder of Bill, investigation and subsequent trial of Melanie, who dismembered and disposed of her husband's body in suitcases.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: Man with my Husband's Face
programme.desc: When a woman's husband disappears during a kayak trip, everyone assumes that he drowned. When she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, it sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: A pastor's wife seeks solace from her marital woes by having an affair with a pool boy. The fling quickly upsets the idyllic facade of the community, reigniting old jealousies.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Gates Of Paradise
programme.desc: The car crash that killed Heaven and Logan left Annie Casteel Stonewall orphaned and crippled. Whisked off to Farthinggale Manor by the possessive Tony Tatterton, Annie pines for her lost family.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, Colleen Stan doesn't think twice when she hitchhikes and is picked up by young couple Cameron and Janice Hooker. But the life she knows is ripped away when they abduct her.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: Her Affair to Die For
programme.desc: A young woman's dad becomes the obsession of her seductive roommate, who will stop at nothing to possess him.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' All That Glitters
programme.desc: Driven from the Dumas mansion back to her beloved bayou, Ruby is determined to make a secure and happy home for her precious infant daughter, Pearl.

programme.title: My Landlord Wants Me Dead
programme.desc: A college dropout unwittingly puts her own life at stake when she investigates a series of strange and terrifying events at her aunt's secluded ranch house.

programme.title: Trapped in Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: College student Erin becomes trapped in her dorm room during Spring Break when a classmate's harmless adoration turns into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: You Had Me at Aloha
programme.desc: After seeing cute, producer Paige banter with host applicant Ben during a job interview, the TV network makes them co-hosts for a travelogue for Oahu. Can they work together?

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: First instalment of a trilogy in which longtime college friends Avery, Emma and Tracy buy an antique lace wedding veil said to bring true love to whoever possesses it.

programme.title: Amazing Grace
programme.desc: In 1972, Aretha Franklin recorded an album of gospel music at The New Temple Missionary Baptist Church in Los Angeles. It went on to become one of the biggest and most beloved albums of her career.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: God is waiting on you. Come Home. Luke 15 (Anchorage, AK, 1984).

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, relatable and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible, their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: Trusting God in Times of Political Upheaval (Part 2)
programme.desc: In part 2 of Trusting God in Times of Political Upheaval, Pastor Bayless examines Daniel's steadfast faith in the midst of political turmoil, even when it put him in danger.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: God's love for us is the most important thing to remember.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What's keeping you from moving forward? Today, Joyce shares how to break free from the past and how to embrace the abundant life God has planned for you!

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships. Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: You Had Me at Aloha
programme.desc: After seeing cute, producer Paige banter with host applicant Ben during a job interview, the TV network makes them co-hosts for a travelogue for Oahu. Can they work together?

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup (The Voice 2013) and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Jeni: Hometown Harvest
programme.desc: This time it's Jeni's turn to show off her culinary skills in her new series Hometown Harvest. Jeni and her friends & family are cooking up some of her favourite foods.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Scrapping the Sultans Stinging Stickers of Selfishness
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: This program will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing faith through music.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Sifting the Evidence
programme.desc: Join host Dr Chris Sinkinson as he visits the great sites of the Holy Land. This two-part documentary series takes you inside these fascinating sites.

programme.title: Celtic Rhythms
programme.desc: Take a journey through Ireland, Scotland, England, & Wales for an adventure in prayer & faith. Travel deep into the heart of Celtic lands; be inspired by the early Celtic Christians to build a rhythm of prayer.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Surprisingly, Jesus spoke more about money than nearly any other topic. Jesus challenged the prevailing wisdom of His day, and taught that all money was God's, to be used for Him instead of for personal advancement.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Acclaimed speaker & TV presenter Gary Kent has produced numerous documentaries on subjects including the Bible, Bible prophecy, world events, historical places & natural health.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: Her Affair to Die For
programme.desc: A young woman's dad becomes the obsession of her seductive roommate, who will stop at nothing to possess him.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: My Professor's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Ashley is a creative writing graduate student who is one thesis away from graduating. Miles Blake, a celebrity murder mystery writer comes to her university to teach. She gets assigned to be his TA.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: The Killer Is Calling
programme.desc: When a mysterious killer targets a remote island town, a veteran 911 operator tries to uncover his motives and save her community, one emergency call at a time.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: However, her world soon comes crashing down when a woman shows up at her doorstep claiming she's married to Leo.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: As Molly Bachman settles into the apartment of her dreams, she discovers a hidden entrance to another apartment within the walls.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: We should not judge others, but God will judge us all. Are you ready?

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What's keeping you from moving forward? Today, Joyce shares how to break free from the past and how to embrace the abundant life God has planned for you!

programme.title: Letters from Mother Teresa
programme.desc: This movie explores the life of Mother Teresa through letters she wrote to her longtime friend and spiritual advisor, Father Celeste van Exem over a nearly fifty-year period.

programme.title: Dealing with Depression
programme.desc: Dealing with Depression aims to provide a gift for those dealing with depression, anxiety, panic attacks, and really tough times. He sings songs and reads scriptures to provide hope, comfort, love and help.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: A librarian with a sharp mind for murder, Aurora Teagarden is known around her small town as a master sleuth. When her friend Jane unexpectedly dies, she also leaves a troubling murder mystery haunting her neighbourhood.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Protected By The Blood Of Jesus Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Having business goals and the strategic plan to get there is essential to working towards success. However, many businesses fail because whilst there is a goal, steps aren't being taken to execute.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference that celebrates the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Mike Chen visits New York's first pizzeria, has an enchanted encounter in Central Park, and chows down with a burger legend in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: Millions of people every year celebrate St Patrick's day with parades, parties and green beer, but what does all this have to do with the celebration of a SAINT?

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The great disappearing of God's children could happen at any time. Learn about this imminent event, the Rapture.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Is the pain of your past holding you back? Today, Joyce reveals ways to break free from the things that are keeping you from moving forward in God's good plan for your life!

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.sub-title: Jesus Travels the Sea of Galilee
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Treasures of Qumran - The Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing faith through music.

programme.title: What's Cooking with Young & Free
programme.desc: Join Young & Free in the kitchen as they serve up a feast of music videos and a side of laughs.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: God's love for us is the most important thing to remember.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: We all have plans for our relationships and work to keep things on the right path. Sometimes, chronic illness or pain gets in the way.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary and Bill team up to investigate a case they believe shouldn't be closed. The women of Hope Valley start a day care. Hickam and Mei celebrate a milestone.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: In Brisbane, Kristine Vicca is at the forefront of a movement that's changing lives. Through Strong Women Talking, she's empowering First Nations women to heal from trauma.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: A Fantail Journey
programme.desc: This series showcases a variety of uniquely Christian Kiwi content produced at Fantail Studios. Jared shares his heart behind them and the call that God has for each of us in sharing testimonies.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: God is waiting on you. Come Home. Luke 15 (Anchorage, AK, 1984).

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: A Fresh Revelation Of The Communion Brings Healing Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: My Professor's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Ashley is a creative writing graduate student who is one thesis away from graduating. Miles Blake, a celebrity murder mystery writer comes to her university to teach. She gets assigned to be his TA.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: When her new roommate goes missing in Italy, an art student teams up with her eccentric aunt to save her friend and bring the kidnapper to justice.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but the night turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake and his pregnant girlfriend, Lindsey, visit a resort, only to find his soon-to-be-ex there. As tensions rise, someone wants to ensure Lindsey never leaves.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son, but when she witnesses a murder, the couple must go on the run to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: When the campers' water supply slows to a trickle, Kenji and Darius head into the jungle to investigate. There, they discover a magnificent watering hole where predators and prey peacefully coexist.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: In this story of survival, Ben must overcome all his trauma and fears as he contends with hungry dinosaurs, a germ-filled jungle, and a rapidly growing Bumpy.

programme.sub-title: Amazamoose and Squirrel Wonder: Chapter Two

programme.desc: Hiccup and the gang infiltrate the outsiders in order to free Heather's parents.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria decides to spend a day at the Central Park Pond with Lala, she's shocked and intimidated to find Lala leaping high into the sky with her new frog friends.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the Nature Channel prompts Melman to believe that he and the gang are too different to live under one roof, Melman escapes to the Bronx Zoo to find his real herd: other giraffes!

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Webby is clearing out her web. Fifi takes all the unwanted objects home and uses them to play a brilliant game of shadow puppets, a perfect game to play on a rainy day.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: The twins are playing The Three Little Pigs. Buttercup is enjoying her role as the big bad wolf rather too much and scares poor Daisy. Will Buttercup realise how upset her sister is?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Buttercup and Daisy decide that it only rains when the sky is upset. They set about trying to cheer the sky up.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose has composed a song for Violet, but is upset when the twins break her guitar. How will she sing for Violet now? Could the twins have the answer?

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Rubber Duck Race
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Greendale Duck Race, where everyone has a little rubber duck and they race them down the River Penn.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Dorothy has bought a super shiny new quad bike for her husband Alf's birthday. Pat has to deliver it, complete with its big red bow before Alf gets home - he's out searching for a lost sheep.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Tricky Tracker
programme.desc: Alf's homing pigeon Cedric is taking part in a big race, and Pat has to deliver a special tracking device for Alf to attach to Cedric. Time is short, so Pat's in a hurry.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.sub-title: Postman Pat And The Greendale Ukulele Big Band

programme.sub-title: Raa Raa And The Hooting Huffty
programme.desc: Hufftys not feeling well so his friends try to cheer him up with games but his loud elephant sneezes keep interrupting. Thats until Raa Raa thinks up a way to make his sneezes part of the fun.
